context: AF class — centre work en pointe, grand allegro, Variation 2 (date approximate)

corrections.text: Start further forward in poses and relevés — weight sitting back throughout
Divide the space evenly in the poses/relevés exercise
Pose derrière: commit to it, shift weight back and over, step under yourself
Retiré leg needs to get up faster on pose derrière
Full height retiré on pas de bourrées, turn on the spot, don't travel
Close in tight fifth and squeeze to stay stable
Rises at barre: pinky toe down throughout, rise on 1 count, lower on 2
Grand jeté en tournant: legs go through first position, not ronde de jambe around
Grand jeté en tournant: land in fondu — continuous movement, don't drop immediately
Gallop needs a sense of up
Variation 2: eyeline up and over, no head throw
More épaulement and upper back twist in Variation 2
Tailbone down, hipbones like headlights facing forward — noted in Variation 2
